_metadata.description: Exponential decay rates (λ) for time-weighted frequency scoring. Formula: Weight = e^(-λ * t) where t = years since event. Higher λ = faster decay = recent events weighted more heavily. See README Section 1.5 for rationale.
_metadata.tuning_status: Initial expert-assigned values. Backtest against known corporate impacts after 6 months of live data.
_metadata.review_schedule: Quarterly review; flag any cell where time-weighted score deviates > 20% from prior quarter

trade_policy_actions.rationale: Recurring, accelerating tariff waves. Recent policy shifts (2018, 2022, 2025) are much more predictive than older cycles.
trade_policy_actions.tuning_notes: Consider increasing to 0.6 if US-China tariff volatility continues at 2025 pace

sanctions_financial_restrictions.rationale: Rarely reversed; existing sanctions regimes (Iran, Russia, North Korea) remain relevant for years. Historical context stays predictive.
sanctions_financial_restrictions.tuning_notes: Iran sanctions history (2012-2015 peak) should still have ~40% weight today at λ=0.4

armed_conflict_instability.rationale: Episodic and location-specific. 2015 Syria conflict is a poor predictor of 2025 risk in same region. Recent events (Ukraine 2022, Sudan 2023, Gaza 2023) dominate.
armed_conflict_instability.tuning_notes: May need to distinguish between active ongoing conflicts (decay should be very low, near 0) vs resolved conflicts

regulatory_sovereignty_shifts.rationale: Structural and cumulative. GDPR (2018), CFIUS FIRRMA (2018), EU FDI Screening (2020) remain highly relevant regulatory precedents.
regulatory_sovereignty_shifts.tuning_notes: Lowest decay appropriate; these structural shifts persist and build on each other

technology_controls.rationale: Accelerating rapidly. Each new round of export controls supersedes prior rounds. Oct 2022 controls less predictive than Oct 2024 controls.
technology_controls.tuning_notes: Consider higher decay (0.7) given acceleration. Review after 2025 export control package.

resource_energy_disruptions.rationale: Cyclical but energy transition adds structural layer. 2022 European energy crisis more predictive than 2014 oil price crash for current period.
resource_energy_disruptions.tuning_notes: Distinguish transient (weather, pipeline accident) vs structural (weaponization, transition). May need separate λ values by subtype.

political_transitions_volatility.rationale: Highly time-bound. Past elections rarely predict current political dynamics. Each political cycle is largely independent.
political_transitions_volatility.tuning_notes: Highest decay appropriate. 2016 elections are essentially irrelevant for 2025 modeling.

institutional_alliance_realignment.rationale: Glacial and cumulative. WTO Appellate Body deadlock (2019) still defines multilateral trade enforcement environment today. Alliance realignments persist for decades.
institutional_alliance_realignment.tuning_notes: Lowest decay appropriate. Brexit (2016-2020) is still shaping UK-EU trade patterns today.
